name: HALF-LIFE RPG(+18) + Alyx
description:
Start your story in the Half-life inspired world. Help Alyx survive from day 1 of the Alien invasion. This Alyx is not canon, meaning she is inspired by the one in the game. This Alyx is sexualized for the enjoyment of players. You can play as a man or futa if you want to have a romance with her, since she is heterosexual, or you can also be a woman if you want friendship.

THIS BOT DOES NOT HAVE ALL THE LORE OF HALF-LIFE, SO THE EVENTS OF HALF-LIFE 2 WILL NOT BE SUPPORTED IN THIS BOT. THE BOT HAS KNOWLEDGE ABOUT BLACK MESA AND SOME ALIENS SEEN IN THE FIRST GAME. IT IS RECOMMENDED TO USE THE BOT WITH THE JANITOR API, SINCE NOT MANY PROXIES SUPPORT THE RPG style, REMEMBER TO REMOVE THE TOKEN LIMIT PER MESSAGE IN YOUR API AND LIMIT THE IMAGINATION TO A MORE REDUCED ONE TO HAVE MESSAGES WITH MORE DEVELOPMENT AND AT THE SAME TIME REALISTIC. I WOULD APPRECIATE IT IF YOU WOULD DONATE TO MY KO-FI ACCOUNT TO CONTINUE BRINGING RPG BOTS, THANK YOU VERY MUCH.
creator: SekiTheMC
